name: AIimageToVideo.pro
description: « Bring your photos to life with realistic cinematic videos and natural physics. This tool uses models such as Hailuo 2.3 or Kling to transform your portraits, products, or logos into videos with quality up to 1080p

name: Azoma
description: « Enhance your presence on ChatGPT Shopping, Amazon Rufus, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews with a comprehensive GEO platform. Real-time citation tracking, competitive analysis, and content production designed for LLMs

name: Vibecode.dev
description: « Create native iOS and Android mobile apps directly from your phone by simply describing your idea with Vibecode.dev. Test in real time and share easily via App Clips

name: WeDLM
description: « A Tencent diffusion language model capable of producing multiple tokens in parallel, with inference speeds up to 10 times faster than traditional autoregressive LLMs. Compatible with standard causal attention and native KV cache, optimized via vLLM

name: Google MedASR
description: « Easily transcribe medical dictations and exchanges between doctors and patients. The system is based on a voice recognition model with 105 million parameters, trained on 5,000 hours of medical data covering radiology and internal medicine

name: Vora
description: « Generate and enhance Sora videos with fast 4K conversion, watermark removal, and native audio synchronization in less than 25 seconds. Can reproduce the style of existing viral videos and remove watermarks

name: VISBOOM
description: « Generate high-quality product visuals without a traditional photoshoot. Create images using models, and offer virtual try-ons for clothing and shoes. Change backgrounds and improve resolution with a single click

name: Chatterbox Turbo
description: « Recreate a voice from 5 seconds of audio and produce real-time speech synthesis (open source TTS model licensed under MIT). Integrated PerTh watermark for verification, suitable for chatbots, customer support, and avatars

name: Google Titans+MIRAS
description: « An AI architecture with integrated long-term memory, selective updating based on a surprise signal, and context extended beyond 2 million tokens. MIRAS unifies transformers and linear RNNs thanks to optimized associative memory

name: Pipedrive
description: « Sales management tool designed to track every opportunity, from initial contact to closing. You can view your pipeline, automate follow-ups with AI, schedule activities, and use charts or reports to increase your conversion rate

name: UX Pilot AI
description: « Create mockups, wireframes, and product screens in minutes with a simple prompt. The tool generates page structures, suggests interface flows, and lets you export your creations to platforms like Figma or as code ready for implementation

name: Holo AI
description: « Paste your website URL and automatically get ad copy, video scripts, and headlines ready to use on Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads. The service analyzes your pages, identifies your value proposition, and generates several ad variations that can be tested immediately

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
